hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; case "$f" in "$d"/*.go) rel="${f#"$d"/}"; out=$(docker compose exec -T wire-dev gofmt -s -w "$rel" 2>&1) || jq -n --arg m "gofmt hook: $out" '{systemMessage: $m}';; esac; }
